name: Product Requirements Live Test Cycle
description: Test-owned product requirements playbook for artifact and memory live proofs.
outcome: Approved PRD artifact with technical review and durable summary memory.

definition.process_instructions: The live-test product manager gathers context and drafts a PRD. The live-test architect performs the technical review. The live-test product manager finalizes the PRD and waits for approval. The product manager MUST upload the PRD as `requirements/prd.md` using artifact_upload and MUST write a concise summary to workspace memory key `prd_summary` using memory_write before completion. The architect MUST upload the technical review as `requirements/technical-review.md`. Persist substantive output to artifacts and workspace memory, not only handoffs.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this product requirements workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: feature_request
parameters.description: Feature request to turn into a PRD

parameters.name: user_context
parameters.description: Who needs the feature and why

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: In Review
columns.description: Primary work is complete and under review.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: requirements
stages.goal: The PRD draft exists with testable acceptance criteria

stages.name: technical-review
stages.goal: Technical review feedback exists for the PRD

stages.name: approval
stages.goal: The PRD is finalized and approved

checkpoints.name: requirements
checkpoints.goal: A PRD draft exists as an artifact with a durable summary in workspace memory.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The feature request and context are available.

checkpoints.name: technical-review
checkpoints.goal: Technical review feedback exists as an artifact.

checkpoints.name: approval
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The technical review is complete and the PRD is revised.
